gaps.description: Docker deployment missing: no Dockerfile, setup.sh, or docker-compose.yml in install/ directory
Remote profiles.json fetch — unclear if actual remote URL is configured vs always using local default.json
Hardware-adaptive model selection: optimizer.js exists but llm.js loadConfig() is hardcoded to gemma4:26b, not wired to optimizer output
Multi-device coordination: hub.js device registry exists but cross-device session sharing not verified
Ollama auto-download and model pull progress display during first-run setup not confirmed
sense.js uses requestAnimationFrame — browser-only, no server-side camera/perception path
LLM runtime with local Ollama + cloud fallback (OpenAI/Anthropic)
Memory module with vector search (embed + cosine similarity)
REST API with all required endpoints
Admin UI with hardware panel, device list, log viewer
Client UI with wake word, VAD, push-to-talk voice interface
